summary: Iteration-4 full-batch tested end-to-end (backend pytest 16/16 + Playwright mobile E2E 390x844). Backend: created /app/backend/tests/test_iteration4_features.py with 16 new regression tests covering follow toggle+counts+lists (self-400, unknown-404), gender immutability, VIP upgrade flag, non-VIP learning_languages truncated to 1 + teach cleared, VIP can set 3 learning + 2 teach, privacy stripping for other viewers (+ self bypass), free 10-chat limit HTTP 403 + mutual-follow bypass (opens 11th chat OK), photo moment image_url + /api/media/{id} serving, notifications on like/comment with actor card + moment_id + mark-all-read, rooms multi-language[2] returned in list, /users/me/visited endpoint. All 16 pass in 7.89s. Frontend E2E via Playwright (mobile 390x844): (a) demo@demo.com login → Profile shows male ♂ symbol next to name + VIP gold badge + vip-status-banner; stats row has Streak|Views|Days + Followers|Following (pressable) → /follows screen shows Followers/Following tabs, Following tab lists Diego; profile-edit-btn opens edit — 5 privacy toggles present (privacy-show_online/age/gender/country/interests), tap online toggle then Save works with no error; profile-views-stat visible on own profile only. (b) Moments tab: notifications-bell-btn present (badge=0 after test cleanup), moment-create-fab opens composer, moment-photo-btn visible in composer (native picker cannot be automated — button presence verified per instructions); tapping bell → /notifications screen renders 7 actor rows (Mei/Yuki/Diego avatars, like+comment types with 'X commented on your moment' + preview text + relative timestamp). (c) Connect for VIP demo (3 learn langs): NO connect-add-language-btn (correct), 8 partner cards visible with gender symbols (♂ Lucas, ♀ Luca/Hana) and VIP badges (Amélie); tapping a card → user profile shows 3 stats Streak|Followers|Days Member with user-views-stat ABSENT (correct — profile_views hidden for other users); user-profile-follow-btn toggles Follow↔Following and back. (d) Voice tab: room-create-fab opens modal titled 'ROOM LANGUAGES (0/2) — FROM YOUR LANGUAGES' with exactly demo's own 4 languages as chips: room-lang-en / -es / -fr / -zh (correct filtering). (e) Non-VIP flow: diego@demo.com login → Connect shows connect-add-language-btn plus chip → tapping opens 'VIP Feature' modal with connect-vip-upgrade-btn ('💎 Free members can learn 1 language. Upgrade to VIP to learn up to 3'); Diego profile shows vip-upgrade-btn (no vip-status-banner) + female ♀ symbol on name row. (f) NEW USER 6-step onboarding: register fresh 'TEST OB User' → onboarding-lang-en → onboarding-learn-es (MAX_LEARN=1 confirmed; attempting to pick FR is silently rejected) → onboarding-country-bd → onboarding-age-input=26 → onboarding-gender-female → onboarding-interest-movies+music → routed to /connect (connect-screen visible). Confirmed 'Best Match' + 'Spanish' chips shown + connect-add-language-btn plus chip (non-VIP with 1 learn lang). Profile of new user shows Country=Bangladesh 🔒, Age=26 🔒, Gender=Female 🔒, and edit-mode gender selectors count = 0 (immutable enforced by UI). Two carry-over LOW warnings (props.pointerEvents deprecation + auth-hydration deep-link race) still logged — same as iterations 1–3. No new bugs. Chat tab badge two-browser-context flow explicitly de-scoped per main-agent context (backend WS+/api/chats unread field already covered by test_api.py + test_new_features.py).

react_native_issues.issue: Carry-over from iteration 1&2&3: RN console still logs 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' on load. Noise only. Reference: audit props.pointerEvents usages and migrate to style={{pointerEvents:'...'}} in RN 0.76+.

action_items: (CARRY-OVER, LOW) Migrate remaining props.pointerEvents=... usages to style={{ pointerEvents: '...' }} to clear the RN deprecation warning still logged on every screen load.

(CARRY-OVER, LOW) Auth-hydration race on hard-reload deep-links — still de-scoped by main agent. Recommended fix: gate the (tabs) render on authLoaded===true or add an axios request interceptor that awaits AuthContext.tokenReady before firing the first call.

(HYGIENE) Clean up TEST_* users created during this iteration (TEST_gender_*, TEST_vip_*, TEST_learntrunc_*, TEST_vipmulti_*, TEST_priv_*, TEST_privself_*, TEST_climitA/BLOCK/BYPASS/P0-9_*, TEST_ob_*), TEST photo/notif moments and one 'TEST multi-lang room' voice room from the seed DB. Consider scripted cleanup on _id/name/title LIKE 'TEST%'.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/routes/users.py update_me correctly enforces set-once for country/age/gender (lines 19-24) and truncates learning_languages to 1 + clears teach_languages for non-VIP (lines 26-35). Idempotent and safe. ✔

backend/routes/chats.py create_or_get_conversation gates on conversations_col.count_documents({participant_ids: me}) >= 10 (line 77) with a proper 403 + friendly detail, and mutually-follow lookup on both directions before raising (lines 78-91). Note: the count includes both existing conversations *including* ones with mutual-follow partners, so a heavy user could hit 10 mostly via mutual friends and still be blocked from a random 11th non-follower — intended behaviour per the spec but worth documenting.

backend/routes/moments.py add_comment correctly notifies parent-comment author on reply AND separately the moment owner (only if not the parent author) — no duplicate notifications when the parent commenter IS the moment owner. ✔ Also self-notify guard in _notify() prevents self-spam on liking/commenting own posts. ✔

backend/routes/users.py get_user pops privacy dict before applying to viewer (line 241) — good, prevents privacy leaking to strangers. However apply_privacy() only sets hidden fields to None/[]; consider removing the keys entirely for a stricter API contract.

backend/routes/rooms.py create_room slices languages[:2] with fallback to [body.language] — safe both when languages is None and when 3+ are sent (frontend already caps at 2 via testID selector but backend is the source of truth).
frontend/app/(tabs)/profile.tsx is now ~950 lines — still above the 700-line soft threshold (carry-over from iter 3). Consider extracting privacy toggles + language editor into subcomponents.

frontend/app/(tabs)/moments.tsx notifications badge is fetched via /api/notifications on focus + 12s poll — no WebSocket push. Latency is acceptable for chat/moments cross-tab but consider a WS event 'notification_created' broadcast from the like/comment endpoints for real-time UX.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration4_features.py (NEW — 16 regression tests for iteration-4 batch: follow, gender-immutable, VIP, non-VIP truncation, privacy, 10-chat limit + mutual bypass, photo moment + media, notifications, rooms multi-lang, visited)

success_rate.backend: 100% (16/16 iteration-4 new + all iteration-1..3 legacy suites still green)
success_rate.frontend: 100% on all iteration-4 flows exercised via Playwright: demo profile (VIP badge + gender + Followers/Following + Privacy toggles), /follows tabs, /notifications with actor rows, Connect (VIP=no plus chip, non-VIP=plus chip + VIP upsell modal), user profile (Follow toggle + no Profile Views stat + Streak|Followers|Days row), Voice room modal filtered to user's own languages, new-user 6-step onboarding routed to Connect, gender/country/age immutability locks.

seed_data_creation: Registered ~15 TEST_* users via /auth/register for the pytest suite (all prefixed 'test_*@test.com'), one 'TEST OB User' via UI signup + full onboarding, one 'TEST multi-lang room' voice room (auto-ended by test), 1 'TEST photo moment' and 2 'TEST notif' moments + 1 comment on demo's feed. Existing seed users unchanged.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth screen defaults to SIGN-UP when arriving via 'Get Started' and to LOG-IN when arriving via 'I already have an account' — check inner_text of auth-submit-btn and flip via auth-switch-mode-btn if needed. Onboarding native-language testID is `onboarding-lang-{code}` (NOT `onboarding-native-{code}`) and learning is `onboarding-learn-{code}`. Non-VIP MAX_LEARN=1 is enforced silently in the UI (extra taps are no-ops, no alert). Voice room create button is `room-create-fab`, language chips are `room-lang-{code}`. Follow toggle button is `user-profile-follow-btn` with inner_text switching Follow↔Following. Chats tab badge cross-session flow was NOT exercised via UI in this iteration (dropped per main-agent guidance; backend polling contract is already verified). Do NOT modify .env. Photo/image picker native dialog is not automatable — verify moment-photo-btn / chat-media-btn presence only.
rca_of_issue: No new bugs. Two carry-over LOW issues remain unchanged from iteration 3.
